hero_subtitle: SFTY gives VASP leadership a unified operating view to manage compliance workflows, reduce operational risk, and strengthen audit readiness at scale without adding complexity.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Compliance operations slow as complexity grows
problem_description: Executives face reduced oversight as compliance workflows multiply and provider outputs remain disconnected. This fragmentation creates challenges in maintaining clear audit trails and consistent decision visibility across teams and jurisdictions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates compliance provider outputs, case workflows, decision logs and audit evidence into a unified control layer that strengthens oversight and supports consistent risk management at scale.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes and routes provider checks through risk reviews, case creation, decision recording and evidence preservation to support scalable compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. Clear executive visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives VASP executives a provider-neutral layer that links compliance workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to reduce risk and support scalable, audit-ready operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a connected compliance layer designed for clear provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help scale compliance operations with clarity
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows maintain audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs connect to executive risk insights
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports scalable compliance without operational chaos
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected, auditable compliance control layer that reduces operational risk and improves visibility across onboarding, monitoring, case management and reporting workflows for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY scale compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, automates case routing, supports rule updates and AI-assisted review, enabling compliance teams to scale without increasing manual workload or operational fragmentation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and linked evidence packages for audit readiness, supporting a clear, traceable record of each compliance decision and regulatory response.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and designed to integrate existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening solutions into one scalable compliance operating environment.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, organizing their outputs into structured compliance workflows without replacing underlying KYC, KYB, KYT or Travel Rule services.
final_title: Scale compliance control with clear oversight
final_description: Review how SFTY supports connected compliance workflows, audit-ready evidence and risk visibility for VASP executives and leadership teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
